entries.name: cig
entries.description: Unique ANAC tender-lot identifier for the current procurement record.

entries.name: cig_accordo_quadro
entries.description: Reference CIG for the parent framework agreement or convention when the current lot derives from one.

entries.name: numero_gara
entries.description: Source procedure identifier for the broader procurement, not necessarily a purely numeric value.
cross_year_notes: Compared with January 2007, the inferred type changed from `integer` to `text`.
notes: The January 2025 file contains mixed identifier formats, so this field should not be treated as strictly numeric.

entries.name: oggetto_gara
entries.description: Overall title or subject of the procurement procedure.
